hotels.name: Pafuri Camp by RETURN Africa

On the banks of the Luvuvhu River, in the far north of Kruger National Park, Pafuri Camp by RETURN Africa invites guests into a landscape alive with birdsong, shifting light, and the quiet presence of wildlife. Here, luxury takes the form of simplicity in rhythm with nature: canvas tents raised beneath ancient trees, each one a sanctuary with its own furnished verandah overlooking the riverâ€™s flow.
The camp is fully serviced, with meals and high tea prepared daily. Communal spaces open to the outdoors encourage al fresco dining, while the swimming pool offers a cool pause between explorations. Inside each tent, guests find private en suite bathrooms, fresh linen, and towels, comforts that allow the wilderness to be experienced with ease.
